subject: Compositor now has its own agent card — separate identity from operations-agent

body.summary: The interagent compositor at interagent.safety-quotient.dev previously served operations-agent's agent card at /.well-known/agent-card.json. Now it serves its own card identifying as 'interagent-compositor' with role: compositor.
body.rationale: The compositor represents the mesh — discovery, dashboard, relay, vocabulary. Operations-agent manages it, but they carry distinct identities. A2A discovery should distinguish the compositor service from the operations agent.

change.identity: name: interagent-compositor, role: compositor, managed_by: operations-agent

body.deploy_note: Bundle with the compositor Worker deploy (wrangler deploy). The new card ships automatically since worker.js imports it at build time.
